responseText:
Updated `gold_rate_2min` to route via Discord DMs by recreating it with `channel=discord` and your paired Discord `senderId` (`1093521227831857283`).

Also extended the scheduler to support this by adding `--sender-id` to `/Users/pure-dev-zulqarnainmac/Downloads/projects/tinyclaw/.agents/skills/schedule/scripts/schedule.sh:1`.

If you don’t receive DMs, make sure the Discord client is running (e.g. `tinyclaw start`) and check `tinyclaw logs discord` (it deletes `discord_*.json` from `~/.tinyclaw/queue/outgoing/` after sending).
